---
name: Documentation Update Request
about: Request corrections or updates to existing documentation
title: "Doc Update Needed: "
labels: documentation
assignees: ""
---

## Existing Documentation

Link or name the page or section that needs an update.

## Required Change

Describe what should be added, removed, clarified, or corrected.

## Reason

Explain why the update is needed.

## Additional Context

Add related code, examples, issues, or external references.
